convergence.evidence: P004 and P005 preserve distinct tank, mage, assassin, support, marksman, and brawler silhouettes. Props and anatomy separate into yoke, shell clamp, ledger, siphon hand, time-bow, blade ring, receipt stamp, slate, prosthetic fist, ligament, flesh clamp, and rifle. Faces span shame, possessive closure, acquisition, ingratiation, feral delight, vacancy, bureaucratic measurement, corrective ownership, labor rage, split surveillance, panic, and cold certainty. The roster shares a dry gothic material envelope without collapsing into one costume, face, body, prop, palette, demon family, or anger expression. No forbidden shiny-anchor contamination is visible.
